title: citrus × reshni
intro: Citrus × reshni, also known as the Meyer's citron or the citron hybrid, is a rare and unique citrus plant resulting from the cross between a pomelo and an orange. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and act as an antimicrobial agent due to its high concentration of flavonoids and limonoids. The health benefits of Citrus × reshni include its potential to improve cardiovascular health, boost the immune system, and exhibit antidiabetic properties. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to make medicinal products or consumed as a natural remedy.
